# E-Commerce App Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Production-ready e-commerce application with React frontend and Express backend.

## Progress Tracking
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [ ] Scaffold React + Express project structure
- [ ] Setup backend API with authentication
- [ ] Build frontend React components
- [ ] Install dependencies and compile
- [ ] Create and run development tasks

## Project Structure
- `/client` - React frontend with Vite and Tailwind CSS
- `/server` - Express backend with SQLite database
- Authentication: JWT-based with admin and customer roles
- Database: SQLite for lightweight production deployment

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 18, Vite, Tailwind CSS, React Router
- Backend: Express, SQLite3, JWT, bcrypt
- Features: Product catalog, shopping cart, order management, user authentication
